Welcome

Welcome to Textra Video

From brief to branded, studio-quality animated video in as little as 24 hours. Tell us about your brand once — our engine and creative team apply your colours, fonts and characters consistently across every video, in over 40 languages.

How it works
1
Fill in this brief
Tell us about your brand, characters, scene and script — takes about 5 minutes.
2
We build your template
Our designers create your branded characters, backgrounds and animations — ready within 2 working days.
3
Start making videos
Upload any script or document and get a fully branded animated video back — fast, consistent, on-brand every time.
Getting Started

Your Details

Tell us who you are so we can set up your project.

01 Contact Information
Step 1 of 4 — Brand

Let's gather your brand details

We apply your colours, fonts and logo to every frame — consistently, across every video. Share your brand below and we'll take care of the rest.

01 How would you like to share your brand?
💡 Most companies already have a brand guidelines document — a PDF or Word doc with your logo, colours and fonts. If you have one, upload it below. If not, fill in the details manually — it only takes 2 minutes.

What to upload: Brand book, visual identity guide, style guide
📥 Download our free template

Logo Preview
✅ Guidelines uploaded. Our team will extract your colours, fonts and logo from the document and apply them to your template. You can also fill in manually if you want to preview your brand now.

Step 4 of 4 — Script

Your Script

Write line by line or upload a document — our AI converts it into a polished script for sign-off.

01 Script Method
Format: Alternates between Speaker A and B. Click ⤢ to expand a cell into a full editor. Add a Visual note for anything other than characters on screen.
